title: Pay with saved credit card

acceptance_criteria.given: The user has a saved credit card
acceptance_criteria.when: The user selects the saved credit card as the payment method

acceptance_criteria.given: The user has no saved credit cards
acceptance_criteria.when: The user tries to pay with a saved credit card
acceptance_criteria.then: An error message is displayed prompting the user to add a credit card

acceptance_criteria.given: The user has multiple saved credit cards
acceptance_criteria.when: The user selects one of the saved credit cards as the payment method
acceptance_criteria.then: The payment is processed successfully with the selected credit card

acceptance_criteria.given: The user's credit card has expired
acceptance_criteria.when: The user tries to pay with the expired credit card
acceptance_criteria.then: An error message is displayed prompting the user to update their credit card information

user_story: As a user, I want to pay with my saved credit card, So that I can make payments quickly and easily

risks.description: PCI compliance issues due to improper credit card data handling
Payment processing issues due to integration failures with the payment gateway
Duplicate transactions due to concurrent payment requests
Data inconsistency due to async failures in updating the user's credit card information

test_cases.title: Successful payment with saved credit card
steps: Add a credit card to the user's account
Select the saved credit card as the payment method
Complete the payment process
test_cases.expected_result: The payment is processed successfully

test_cases.title: Failed payment due to expired credit card
steps: Add an expired credit card to the user's account
Select the expired credit card as the payment method
Complete the payment process
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed prompting the user to update their credit card information

test_cases.title: Duplicate transaction handling
steps: Add a credit card to the user's account
Select the saved credit card as the payment method
Simulate concurrent payment requests
test_cases.expected_result: The system handles the duplicate transactions correctly and prevents duplicate payments

test_cases.title: Payment processing issue due to integration failure
steps: Add a credit card to the user's account
Select the saved credit card as the payment method
Simulate an integration failure with the payment gateway
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed prompting the user to try again later

test_cases.title: Saved credit card with a cancelled account
steps: Save a credit card with a cancelled account
Attempt to make a payment using the saved credit card
test_cases.expected_result: Payment fails with an error message indicating a cancelled account

test_cases.title: Saved credit card with a declined account
steps: Log in to the application
Navigate to the payment page
Select a saved credit card with a declined account
Attempt to make a payment
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed prompting the user to add a new credit card

test_cases.title: Saved credit card with a security freeze
steps: Log in to the application
Navigate to the payment page
Select a saved credit card with a security freeze
Attempt to make a payment
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed prompting the user to contact the bank

test_cases.title: Saved credit card with a merchant-specific issue
steps: Log in to the application
Navigate to the payment page
Select a saved credit card with a merchant-specific issue
Attempt to make a payment
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed prompting the user to contact the merchant

test_cases.title: Saved credit card with a security freeze
steps: Log in to the application
Navigate to the payment page
Select a saved credit card with a security freeze
Attempt to make a payment
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed prompting the user to contact the bank

test_cases.title: Saved credit card with a user account change
steps: Create a saved credit card
Change the user account associated with the saved credit card
Attempt to make a payment using the saved credit card
Verify that the payment is processed using the updated user account
test_cases.expected_result: The payment is processed successfully using the updated user account

test_cases.title: Saved Credit Card with Zero Balance
steps: Create a saved credit card with a zero balance
Select the saved credit card as the payment method
Process the payment
test_cases.expected_result: Payment should fail due to insufficient funds

title: Validate Numeric Characters in Password

acceptance_criteria.given: The user is creating a new account
acceptance_criteria.when: The user enters a password with at least one numeric character
acceptance_criteria.then: The system accepts the password and allows the user to proceed

acceptance_criteria.given: The user is creating a new account
acceptance_criteria.when: The user enters a password without any numeric characters
acceptance_criteria.then: The system displays an error message indicating that the password must contain at least one numeric character

acceptance_criteria.given: The user is creating a new account
acceptance_criteria.when: The user enters a password with only numeric characters
acceptance_criteria.then: The system accepts the password and allows the user to proceed

acceptance_criteria.given: The user is updating their existing password
acceptance_criteria.when: The user enters a new password with at least one numeric character
acceptance_criteria.then: The system updates the password and displays a success message

user_story: As a user, I want to ensure my password contains numeric characters, so that I can enhance the security of my account

risks.description: Password cracking due to weak password policy
Inconsistent password validation across different platforms
Incorrect error messages or feedback to the user

test_cases.title: Valid Password with Numeric Characters
steps: Enter a password with at least one numeric character
Submit the password
Verify the system accepts the password
test_cases.expected_result: The system accepts the password and allows the user to proceed

test_cases.title: Invalid Password without Numeric Characters
steps: Enter a password without any numeric characters
Submit the password
Verify the system displays an error message
test_cases.expected_result: The system displays an error message indicating that the password must contain at least one numeric character

test_cases.title: Password with Only Numeric Characters
steps: Enter a password with only numeric characters
Submit the password
Verify the system accepts the password
test_cases.expected_result: The system accepts the password and allows the user to proceed

test_cases.title: Concurrent Password Updates
steps: Update the password with a new password containing numeric characters
Simultaneously update the password again with a different password containing numeric characters
Verify the system updates the password correctly and displays a success message
test_cases.expected_result: The system updates the password correctly and displays a success message

test_cases.title: Password with Special Characters and Numeric Characters
steps: The user is creating a new account
The user enters a password with at least one numeric character and one special character (@, #, $, etc.)
The system accepts the password and allows the user to proceed
test_cases.expected_result: The system should accept the password with special characters and numeric characters

test_cases.title: Password with Numeric Characters and Special Characters in the Middle
steps: Enter a new password with numeric characters and special characters in the middle (e.g., 1a!2b3)
Submit the password update form
test_cases.expected_result: The system updates the password and displays a success message

test_cases.title: Password with Leading Zeroes
steps: Enter a password with leading zeroes (e.g., 0123)
Submit the password update form
test_cases.expected_result: The system updates the password and displays a success message

test_cases.title: Password with Trailing Zeroes
steps: Enter a new password with numeric characters and trailing zeroes (e.g., 12300)
Submit the password update request
test_cases.expected_result: The system updates the password and displays a success message

test_cases.title: Password with Numeric Characters and Special Characters at the End
steps: Enter a new password with at least one numeric character and a special character at the end
Submit the password update form
test_cases.expected_result: The system updates the password and displays a success message

test_cases.title: Password with Very Short Numeric Characters
steps: Enter a new password with very short numeric characters, e.g., '1'
test_cases.expected_result: The system updates the password and displays a success message

test_cases.title: Password with Zero-Length Numeric Characters
steps: Enter a new password with zero-length numeric characters (e.g., '123' or '001')
Submit the password update
test_cases.expected_result: The system should reject the password update due to invalid numeric characters

test_cases.title: Password with Numeric Characters and Special Characters in the Middle (Non-English Characters)
steps: Enter a new password with at least one numeric character and special characters from non-English languages (e.g., Chinese, Japanese, Korean)
Submit the password update form
test_cases.expected_result: The system updates the password and displays a success message
